feed.title: SAP Community - SAP HANA Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP HANA Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: FIelds are not visible under Table in calculation view
entry.content:
Hi all, i am able to add table into projection as below

but i am unable to see the fields under this table.Am i doing any mistakes here ?

I am using trail account in SAP BTP cockpit.

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: How can SAP DP Agent be installed on IBM AIX server?
entry.content:
Hi,

We have SAP ECC installed on IBM AIX server and want to use SAP DP Agent to federate / replicate it's data on SAP HANA Cloud DB on BTP. Based on the supported platforms provided in the standard documentation, I can see that DP Agent is supported on Windows and Linux (RHEL and SLES) systems only.

Is it possible to install the DP Agent on IBM AIX?

Or if it is not possible, are there any alternatives to do this (federation / replication of data from SAP ECC into HANA Cloud DB)?

entry.title: SSC certification error in Live Connection?
entry.content: unable to build a new hana live connection

entry.title: SAP Hana Cloud: Database Error: Cannot Insert Null or update to Null
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We are facing the db error "Database Error: Cannot Insert Null or update to Null" when trying to deploy the db changes in cloud foundry space. Please note that there is already a previous version which is in production and now as a new change we added a new field in db which is a primary key. I understand the issue is because of this new field being primary key as its expecting some value and can't accept null.

However we can't pass any default values to this field and need this as a primary key. Do we have any way to handle this situation without deleting the already deployed instances. (as productive db data will be lost).

Please suggest!

Thanks,

Rakesh

entry.title: Details of released transport in sap public cloud project for development tenant
entry.content:
We would like to understand how to check the released transport in ADT public cloud project. Currently in transport organizer we can only see the modifiable transports that are not yet released. Once its released we can see it in test system but we do not found any option to see the transports created and released in development tenant

Screen shot of transport organizer. Here we can see modifiable requests not the released one

Can't we see released transports like below?

entry.title: How many records are gets uploaded in HANA S4 of a CAPM Application
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am uploading a excel sheet in CAPM application. In service all records are read and inserting into database.

But if any case 1st row having column of size 10 character string (eg: 'abcdefghij') but in table column size it support only 4 character string (Eg: 'abcd').

In this

case1. database will reject all records without inserting

case2: if it skip my first row and insert all rows. if this happens how would i know how many records are inserted.

Please give me answer

Thanks

Suresh Kardhala

entry.title: How to consume one application component in another using a destination service in Bas
entry.content:
i have sap ui5 application with two input fields with value help dialogs and two fragments will be opened by clicking the valuehelps .

i have deployed the apps in cloud foundry now i have deployed app url

now i have another sap ui5 application, i want to consume the fragments and input fields of deloyed app in this appliation
how can i reuse the component of a deployed application in other sap ui5 apps using a destination service or is there anyway to consume the app
i have created cap application and created a fiori app and deployed in CF and i created a destination
is it possible to do this using destination
I need assistance regarding or i need any git links with similar requirement.

entry.title: Can HANA cloud COLD storage be used as permanent storage ?
entry.content:
We are building an application for one of our customer and they have requirement to store the data in HANA cloud database.

We know that COLD storage can be used for backup but we want to know can it be used permanent storage and how to retrieve it later.

The business is expecting the table entries to be retained for approx 23 years. Means the transaction FIORI app should be able to retrieve and show 23 years old data as well on the UI. Is this requirement feasible using the Data tiering options of SAP HANA Cloud service (Hot, Cold, Warm)? Is it possible to retrieve cold storage table entries using the normal CQL queries ? Would the same queries which are applicable for HOT and WARM storage are applicable for COLD as well ? OR any adjustments required in the select queries based on the year of the data which is expected to retrieve ?

RegardsMujeeb

entry.title: Packages Flight Model /DMO/FLIGHT, /DMO/SAP missing on SAP cloud trial
entry.content:
Dear SAP experts,

I started learning ABAP RAP in December 2023 using trial account on SAP cloud platform. Everything worked fine with the flight model package /DMO/FLIGHT.

But since January 2024 these packages are either missing and or as package /DMO/SAP do not contain objects.

When will the /DMO/SAP and /DMO/FLIGHT packages be restored on SAP trial platform. Maybe somebody from SAP with authorization can restore them ?

Thank you.

Kind regards,

Birgit

entry.title: Re: Can I access the BW Bridge Space from outside (e.g. f...
entry.content:
Hi @alexander_drrstein 

Very good question, my two cents are:

I don't think you can use RFC!  I'm not sure about with Service Keys. The Service Keys seems to be a like regular CF services keys. 

Technically speaking it seems SAP HANA SQL Access could be used since we know Host and Port numbers of BW Bridge; of course you should get credentials. Though as BW Bridge space does not have Database Access option that would be the way to access the data in BW Bridge space.

Thanks,
Tuncay

entry.title: SAP HANA Cloud - how to archive data?
entry.content:
Hi,

I have some CAP projects running on SAP HANA Cloud instance.

There are some data that I want to archive in order to save costs and restore if something goes wrong.

Also users can select date range to archive data.

I know there is backup and recovery functionality in SAP HANA Cloud but it doesn't meet the requirements.

Has anyone done anything like this before?

Regards,

Minh

entry.title: SAP S/4 HANA CLOUD DEVELOPMENT ASSOCIATE
entry.content:
Hi,

I have 23 years of extensive experience in Software Development and Product Development. Now, I want to move to SAP as a Development Associate. What and how should I go for the certification.

Pls, if anyone can guide me.

Thank you

Rajeev

New Delhi, INDIA

entry.title: The Cloud Foundry Edition of SAP HANA Cloud Central is deprecated
entry.content:
Hi, I'm following the course "Building side-by-side exentsions on SAP BTP". In unit 7 I need to set Up SAP HANA Cloud Instance. Exercise: Preparing the Application for Deployment. When following the steps, I get this error:

Followed the link and created the SAP HANA Cloud instance. However, when I use "Go to application", I get this error:

Any thoughts on this one?

Thanks.

entry.title: eDocument Italy - xml attachments
entry.content:
How to attach local files in invoice edocument(xml)


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: How to change the name of Table Schema in SAP HANA Database Instance of SAP BTP
entry.content:
Hi Team,

When I created a DB instance at SAP BTP subaccount level then schema name came automatically as "MYSALES_HDI_MYSALES_DB_DEPLOYER_1" (as shown in below screenshot).

I wanted to change the schema name 'TEST_SRP', for the same I have added below code in mta.yaml file.

And then successfully build & deployed the CAP project. But schema name is not changed and at subaccount level for that db instance I have received error as 'Update Failed' (as shown in below screenshot).

How to change the name of any schema related to the db instance. And what are the impact of this name change on existing db tables?

Kindly guide on the same.

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: How to activate a User from User Management of SAP BTP HANA Cloud Cockpit
entry.content:
Hi,

In my SAP BTP HANA Cloud Cockpit --> User & Role management, currently one user is in 'deactivated' state and because of it we are not able to perform CRUD operations on SAP HANA Cloud Tables. Kindly guide me how to activate this user.

Thanks.

entry.title: How to Activate a User created by System SuperUser(_SYS_DI_SU) from SAP HANA Cockpit User Management
entry.content:
Hi,

In SAP HANA Cockpit User management, when any new user is created by DBADMIN user, then for that new user I am able to see 'Activate/Deactivate' option. But when any user is created by super user (_SYS_DI_SU) and I have logged in as DBADMIN then I am not able to see that 'Activate' option. I also tried ALTER command from DBADMIN SQL window but it's showing me authorization issue.

Kindly guide how to activate any user created by system user '_SYS_DI_SU'.

(Note - We have observed that when we write a schema name in mta.yaml and then build + deploy the MTA project then that schema as a user is getting created in User Management and there its showing created _SYS_DI_SU and it's in deactivate state.)

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Hana Cloud Certification soon dissapear, why?
entry.content:
Hello, recently i saw that HANA CLOUD certifications will dissappear soon in March, any idea why?
How it will be in the future? 

Thank you,

Best regards,

Ghenadie

entry.title: Unable to connect to HANA Cloud instance throwing Connection failed (RTE:[89013] Socket closed by pe
entry.content:
While connecting to an standard HANA cloud database from the visual studio code Hana explorer, I am getting below error,

[ERROR] The connection to the database failed with reason: Connection failed (RTE:[89013] Socket closed by peer {0.0.0.0:59250 -> 3.215.33.125:443} (0.0.0.0:59250 -> xxxx.hana.prod-us10.hanacloud.ondemand.com:443))

entry.title: Single HDI container for multiple CAP apps —recommended?
entry.content:
Hi,

We are currently managing multiple CAP applications catering to different modules. I am contemplating the idea of adopting a centralized approach by creating a single HDI container. Within this container, the plan is to generate separate tables/views for each CAP application What are your thoughts on this approach, and do you have any recommendations or considerations to keep in mind when implementing such a strategy? Or Should we create separate HDI container for each module/CAP application 

Thanks

Somnath
